AILandia

An interactive AI-society simulation

Selected agent

Click an agent to inspect it.

About

Each dot is an autonomous agent with its own personality, wealth and a favourite idea (its colour). Agents wander, meet, trade resources and occasionally adopt a neighbour's idea — so culture spreads. Tweak the sliders and watch the society change.

AILandia · runs entirely in your browser · deployed on Cloudflare Pages
